title: MySQL Basic Commands
description: Basic MySQL commands for connecting, exploring, and interacting with a MySQL database.

commands.title: Connect to MySQL
commands.description: Connect to a remote MySQL server using IP and port.

commands.title: Use Database
commands.description: Select a specific database to work with.

commands.title: Show All Tables
commands.description: List all tables in the current database.

commands.title: Show Table Columns
commands.description: View the column names and data types of a specific table.

commands.title: Select All Data
commands.description: Display all data from a given table.

commands.title: Select Specific Column
commands.description: Display specific column values from a table.
